title: Lexicon
subtitle: A glossary of Nonism. Aphoristic. Derived from the blog corpus. Updated as the journal accumulates.

entries.definition: Living as if your choices were given to you by someone else. The opposite is not 'good faith' but ownership: noticing that you chose, and that you can choose again.
entries.source: Day 22, On Being a Rousseaurian Stoic Existentialist

entries.definition: The city I have least left to disagree with, structurally. Forty-two years in the same house is not residence; it is calibration.

A vehicle that proves the future doesn't exist until you pedal toward it. The Brompton is its compact case. The Leibniz move (this is the best of all possible worlds, therefore I bike) was made in Day 3 of the blog.
entries.source: Day 3, Because We Are Living in the Best of All Possible Worlds

entries.definition: A folding bicycle. Also, the only object I own that has improved every year for forty years. The instruction has been: subtract until the object is the journey, then add a hinge.
The substrate. Implicit, not promoted. Four Noble Truths as a working method: name the suffering, find its origin, define cessation, build the path. Anatta as the precondition for design.
Not a place where you meet over coffee. A place where two people perform access to modernity to each other. The floor plan was inherited from authoritarianism; capitalism kept the layout.
Built by failing in public, dated. Built nowhere else.
entries.source: Day 24, On Death · Day 27, I Was Just Lucky

entries.definition: What I write toward, when the word 'happiness' would lie. The instrument reads steadier on a Sunday, a Brompton, no obligations. That is all.
entries.source: Day 16, How Do I Want to Get Old

entries.definition: A four-year exercise in deciding you will finish. If you cannot decide that before you start, the answer is no.
The protocol of this project. Every claim about my life is rated VERIFIED, CONTRADICTED, UNVERIFIED, or UN-VERIFIABLE. The fourth category is the most honest.

Two years in Yangpu District, Shanghai. The PhD said 'anthropology' but the instrument was architectural. The same eye reads space and reads people; the question is which one the building is pretending to be about.
The share of memory that disagrees with the public record. The disagreement is not lying. It is the mind's grammar reaching for nearby anchors.

A for-profit company in Massachusetts authorized by law to act as a single entity that thinks of itself as an educational institution. I went there. The diploma exists. The question of what it means belongs to the institutions that issued it.
Not a place. A direction of return. For forty-two years the direction has been the same row house in the same district. The question 'where is home' has therefore been answered by walking.
entries.source: Day 76, Home is Where the Heart Is

entries.definition: The chain: pain → life → flow → fun → reason to have been born. Skipping any link makes the answer grim or saccharine. The mentor's job is to hold the chain whole.
The cost of having opinions. The cost of not having opinions is greater, but spread out.
The mind's grammar. Where it disagrees with the record, the record is more accurate, but memory is more interesting. The disagreement is the most interesting cell on the page.
What people perform when they sit across from each other in a coffee shop. The performance is sincere. The set is borrowed.
A working name for whatever the blog accumulates. Currently: skeptical of tradition, kind to people, suspicious of institutions, fond of bicycles. Not a doctrine. A direction.
A 1980s Bangkok shopping arcade with classical pretensions in its interior columns. Memory says Doric and Ionic. The photographs needed to verify this are not yet found. UN-VERIFIED.
Does not exist until you walk on it. The future is a literary device for the present tense.
The disease this whole worldview diagnoses. 'My team', 'my audience', 'my market' — copy that encodes possession is copy that has misunderstood the structural setup.
The unit of currency. An answer that doesn't invite the next question is not worth the page it occupies.
entries.source: Day 8, On the Nature of Question

entries.definition: The Cathay Pacific poll lesson: the question's frame contains the answer. Every metric on this site must show how the question was asked.

Bangkok's most significant modernist hotel until 2002, when it was demolished to build a mall. Nobody objected. The mall is now Siam Paragon. The hotel exists only in archive footage and in the row-house at the corner where I still live.
Mr. Non the skeptic. He gets a seat in every design review. If a feature exists because that is how features work, he removes it.
A city that calls itself smart and scores below 55/100 on independent indices. The branding precedes the performance by a decade. See SCITI for the live data.
What writing requires. Editing is social. Drafting is alone. The difference between a thought and an idea is one revision in company.
entries.source: Day 1, blog · What Does Writing Do to Me

entries.definition: The anthropologist's move. When you cannot say 'who killed', you can still say 'who in which position would most want this victim killed.' The shape of the answer is also an answer.
entries.source: 100 Days of Non · the bot's signature

entries.definition: What you do before you add. The rule applies to projects, files, sentences, possessions, and friends. Day 90 of the blog (Design Thinking, Part 10) is the long form.
The day I was born. 1 November 1981. Phyathai Hospital, Bangkok. The weekday matters because all subsequent Sundays inherit it.
Absolutely nothing.
entries.source: Day 5, Tradition: What's Good For? — the shortest sentence in the blog

entries.definition: The fourth claim category. Not 'haven't checked yet'. 'Cannot be checked, ever.' The honest entries on this site live here.

The New Zealand luggage story. Bad event → catastrophe reaction → time passes → insurance payout was ten times the fix. The wheel had not yet arrived when the verdict was made. Most verdicts are made too early.
The only cognitive technology that slows thought down enough to inspect it. Speech is too fast; thought is faster. Writing is the rest stop.
entries.source: Day 1, blog · also Day 1, 100 Days of Non
